channel.title: Comments on: Episode 33 – OAKED Arrogant Bastard Ale
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
It is Kathy and Kris on the open to the video segments. We were at the Rochester Brewfest and I made them say it. Thanks so much for coming to my site - I really do appreciate it!!
Paul
item.content:encoded:
It is Kathy and Kris on the open to the video segments. We were at the Rochester Brewfest and I made them say it. Thanks so much for coming to my site – I really do appreciate it!!

Paul

item.title: By: Kendra and Bud Eggleton
item.dc:creator: Kendra and Bud Eggleton
item.description: We've been checking on this site a lot, we love it. Question: Are the girls shown at the beginning, on the TV, the Pucher twins??? If so, tell them we said hello and we enjoyed seeing them on this site.
item.content:encoded:
We’ve been checking on this site a lot, we love it. Question: Are the girls shown at the beginning, on the TV, the Pucher twins??? If so, tell them we said hello and we enjoyed
seeing them on this site.

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: What's with me sucking my teeth? Looks like my dentures are loose.
item.content:encoded: What’s with me sucking my teeth? Looks like my dentures are loose.
